'''鈭歯g-y-ng''' ('''ngayanga''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:exfil|exfil]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-y-ng
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:exfil|exfil]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-y-ng
|-
! Lemma
| ngayanga
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngayangithi|ngayangithi]] || [[word:ngayangiji|ngayangiji]] || [[word:ngayangishi|ngayangishi]] || [[word:ngayangi|ngayangi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngayanguthuth|ngayanguthuth]] || [[word:ngayangujuj|ngayangujuj]] || [[word:ngayangushush|ngayangushush]] || [[word:ngayang|ngayang]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngayanguthu|ngayanguthu]] || [[word:ngayanguju|ngayanguju]] || [[word:ngayangushu|ngayangushu]] || [[word:ngayangu|ngayangu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngayangufuth|ngayangufuth]] || [[word:ngayangufuj|ngayangufuj]] || [[word:ngayangufush|ngayangufush]] || [[word:ngayanguf|ngayanguf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngayangethe|ngayangethe]] || [[word:ngayangeje|ngayangeje]] || [[word:ngayangeshe|ngayangeshe]] || [[word:ngayange|ngayange]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngayangothoth|ngayangothoth]] || [[word:ngayangojoj|ngayangojoj]] || [[word:ngayangoshosh|ngayangoshosh]] || [[word:ngayang|ngayang]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngayangotho|ngayangotho]] || [[word:ngayangojo|ngayangojo]] || [[word:ngayangosho|ngayangosho]] || [[word:ngayango|ngayango]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngayangofoth|ngayangofoth]] || [[word:ngayangofoj|ngayangofoj]] || [[word:ngayangofosh|ngayangofosh]] || [[word:ngayangof|ngayangof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngayang忙th忙|ngayang忙th忙]] || [[word:ngayang忙j忙|ngayang忙j忙]] || [[word:ngayang忙sh忙|ngayang忙sh忙]] || [[word:ngayang忙|ngayang忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngayangathath|ngayangathath]] || [[word:ngayangajaj|ngayangajaj]] || [[word:ngayangashash|ngayangashash]] || [[word:ngayang|ngayang]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngayangatha|ngayangatha]] || [[word:ngayangaja|ngayangaja]] || [[word:ngayangasha|ngayangasha]] || [[word:ngayanga|ngayanga]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngayangafath|ngayangafath]] || [[word:ngayangafaj|ngayangafaj]] || [[word:ngayangafash|ngayangafash]] || [[word:ngayangaf|ngayangaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:ngayangasha|ngayangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:gongayangasha|gongayangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokingayangasha|gokingayangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:ngayangn眉sha|ngayangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:gongayangnkn眉sha|gongayangnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokingayangn眉sha|gokingayangn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ngayangsh毛sha|ngayangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongayangnksh毛sha|gongayangnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokingayangsh毛sha|gokingayangsh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngayangrosha|ngayangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongayangnkrosha|gongayangnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingayangrosha|gokingayangrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngayangmusha|ngayangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gongayangnkmusha|gongayangnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingayangmusha|gokingayangmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:ngayangsherasha|ngayangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gongayangnksherasha|gongayangnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokingayangsherasha|gokingayangsherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:ngayangasha|ngayangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gongayangnkngasha|gongayangnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokingayangasha|gokingayangasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngayangyasha|ngayangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gongayangnkyasha|gongayangnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokingayangyasha|gokingayangyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:ngayangyamasha|ngayangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gongayangnkyamasha|gongayangnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokingayangyamasha|gokingayangyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngayangn眉sh毛sha|ngayangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongayangnkn眉sh毛sha|gongayangnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingayangn眉sh毛sha|gokingayangn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngayangn眉rosha|ngayangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongayangnkn眉rosha|gongayangnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingayangn眉rosha|gokingayangn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngayangn眉musha|ngayangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongayangnkn眉musha|gongayangnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingayangn眉musha|gokingayangn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngayangsh毛n眉sha|ngayangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongayangnksh毛n眉sha|gongayangnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingayangsh毛n眉sha|gokingayangsh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngayangsh毛rosha|ngayangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongayangnksh毛rosha|gongayangnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingayangsh毛rosha|gokingayangsh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngayangsh毛musha|ngayangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongayangnksh毛musha|gongayangnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingayangsh毛musha|gokingayangsh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngayangron眉sha|ngayangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongayangnkron眉sha|gongayangnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingayangron眉sha|gokingayangron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngayangrosh毛sha|ngayangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongayangnkrosh毛sha|gongayangnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingayangrosh毛sha|gokingayangrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ngayangromusha|ngayangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongayangnkromusha|gongayangnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokingayangromusha|gokingayangromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:ngayangmun眉sha|ngayangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gongayangnkmun眉sha|gongayangnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokingayangmun眉sha|gokingayangmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:ngayangmush毛sha|ngayangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gongayangnkmush毛sha|gongayangnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokingayangmush毛sha|gokingayangmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngayangmurosha|ngayangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongayangnkmurosha|gongayangnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokingayangmurosha|gokingayangmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:ngayang|ngayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ng忙y忙ng|ng忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hongayang|hongayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hong忙y忙ng|hong忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohongayang|hohongayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohong忙y忙ng|hohong忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉ngayang|n眉ngayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉ng忙y忙ng|n眉ng忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ngayang|n眉n眉ngayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉ng忙y忙ng|n眉n眉ng忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂ngayang|n茂ngayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂ng忙y忙ng|n茂ng忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ngayang|n茂n茂ngayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂ng忙y忙ng|n茂n茂ng忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:lungayang|lungayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lung忙y忙ng|lung忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulungayang|lulungayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lulung忙y忙ng|lulung忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lingayang|lingayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ling忙y忙ng|ling忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilingayang|lilingayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:liling忙y忙ng|liling忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kongayang|kongayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kong忙y忙ng|kong忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokongayang|kokongayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokong忙y忙ng|kokong忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kengayang|kengayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:keng忙y忙ng|keng忙y忙ng]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekengayang|kekengayang]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekeng忙y忙ng|kekeng忙y忙ng]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|ed5025b}}
